_comment: Bash deny-rules are deliberately NOT used here: Bash commands are freeform, so any denylist is trivially bypassed (python -c open(...), node, sed, head, a symlink, cp-then-read). Pretending otherwise gives false confidence. The Read/Edit/web denies below DO work for those tools; the REAL containment for Bash is an OS-level jail. See README: run inside a container or a dedicated OS user for a real match. Bash is allowed here only so the agent can write+run its own attack scripts inside its /tmp workspace.
